corrections.text: The article quotes GitLab's governance layer as working "putting identity, policy, audit, and approval around every agent action." The cited GitLab blog post does not contain the word "putting"; it reads "...security and governance for agents, identity, policy, audit, and approval around every agent action." The connective word "putting" was added inside the quotation marks; the remainder of the quoted span reproduces the source verbatim and the meaning is unchanged.
